name: Rokid Music Score
summary: Piano score viewer for Rokid AR glasses with built-in classic Jay Chou pieces
description: Rokid Music Score is an APK for viewing piano scores on Rokid AR glasses. It includes classic simplified scores by Jay Chou for convenient practice and reference.
author: bcefghj

listing.descriptionMarkdown:
# About
Rokid Music Score is a piano score viewer designed specifically for Rokid AR glasses. It features built-in classic simplified piano scores by Jay Chou.

# Key features
- View piano scores directly on Rokid AR glasses
- Includes classic Jay Chou simplified scores for practice

# Requirements
- Compatible with Rokid AR glasses
- No phone required
